name: extension includes a closed-not-resolved security issue when the resolution status field is unresolved
command: mkdir -p fixtures && printf '{"number":7,"state":"closed","labels":["security"],"resolution":"wont_fix","body":"x"}\n' > fixtures/issues.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/issue-tracker.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/issues.jsonl --emit patterns --out patterns.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"number":7' patterns.jsonl && grep -q '"resolution":"wont_fix"' patterns.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
